utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: The movie theatre , you used to come in all the time .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You still work at the multiplex ?

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Oh , like I would give up that job ! Free popcorn and candy , anytime I want . I can get you free posters for your room .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Free popcorn and candy , anytime I want .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Thanks , I am set . Do you still live with your parents ?

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Oh yeah , but I can stay out as late as I want .
